Brand: Clover Hill Dairy (relabeled as KESSO, QUESOS LA RICURA, IZALCO, DE MI PUEBLO, RIO LINDO)
Product: EXPANDED RECALL — all Clover Hill Dairy brand cheese (hard and soft). Includes: Soft Cuajada in Brine (5-gal bucket 30-lb, 2-gal bucket 14-lb); Soft Cuajada vacuum sealed (5-lb bags, 2.5-lb clamshell, 0.90-lb / 14-oz clamshell); Cuajada vacuum sealed (30-lb boxes); Ricotta (5-gal bucket 40-lb, 2-gal bucket 18-lb, 2.5-lb tubs, 1-lb clamshell); Soft Cuajada Crumbs; Mild Cheese Varieties — Yummy Cheddar, White Cheddar, White Colby, Monterey Jack, Marble Jack (½-lb, 1-lb, 2.5-lb, 5-lb, 40-lb); Sharp Cheese Varieties — Cheddar, Yummy Cheddar, White Cheddar, Monterey Jack; Flavored — Horseradish, Old Bay Cheddar; Pepper Jack Varieties — Jalapeño Cheddar, Pepper Jack, Sizzlin Colby with Habanero Peppers; Smoked Cheddar (Cheddar, White Cheddar); Smoked Pepper — Jalapeño Cheddar; plus Fresh Cheddar Curd and assorted Snack Pack / 3-in-a-Pack stix formats. Plant permit number 24-128 printed on clamshell containers.
Reason: FDA Company Announcement + Publish Date both 2026-06-18. EXPANSION of the earlier Clover Hill Dairy recall (R57, 2026-06-09) which covered only Soft Ricotta/Requesón cheese. The expansion broadens scope to ALL Clover Hill Dairy brand cheese due to potential Listeria monocytogenes contamination. As of 2026-06-18, the outbreak count linked to soft cheese products stands at 9 illnesses, 8 hospitalizations, and 1 death. Distribution: direct retail market, farmers markets, and third-party distributors across NC, NY, VA, MD, NJ, and Washington DC. Products may be relabeled under brands KESSO, QUESOS LA RICURA, IZALCO, DE MI PUEBLO, and RIO LINDO. Consumers urged to check manufacturer permit number 24-128 on clamshell containers.
Notes: Manual add 2026-06-18. EXPANSION of Clover Hill Dairy Listeria recall cluster (original recall R57 2026-06-09 covered Ricotta/Requesón only; CDC outbreak pages already at R91 investigation + R93 index dated 2026-06-04). All-brand expansion is a distinct regulatory action — kept separately per AFTS multi-document cluster convention. Death toll increased from 0 to 1 since original recall. Linked to FDA Outbreak Advisory at fda.gov/food/outbreaks-foodborne-illness/outbreak-investigation-listeria-monocytogenes-soft-cheese-june-2026.

Reason: NY State Department of Agriculture & Markets Food Inspectors sampled the 18 lb bulk "Clover Hill Dairy Requeson Cheese" container (sell-by 2026-06-14, batch #2AA051526) at retail. NY Food Laboratory analysis confirmed Listeria monocytogenes contamination. Nelson & Isa Lacteos LLC of Bayshore, NY voluntarily initiated recall of 1 lb clamshell packages repacked from the contaminated bulk container.
Notes: Company Announcement and FDA Publish Date both 2026-06-05. Connected to the broader multi-state Clover Hill Dairy Listeria outbreak (existing R36 CDC outbreak investigation + R24 outbreak index for soft-cheese-06-26). Nelson & Isa Lacteos is the retail repacker — they did NOT manufacture the cheese; they repacked Clover Hill Dairy 18 lb bulk containers into 1 lb clamshells at their NY retail. No illnesses reported in this firm's specific distribution (outbreak=0 for this row; the CDC outbreak rows carry the outbreak=1 flag). Manual operator add 2026-06-09. fda_listing.py title-only filter missed this URL — slug ends in "possible-health-risk" with no pathogen keyword (same fail pattern as Champion Foods, Prime Herring, Mogo, Total Nutrition, SKS Copack — sixth confirmed instance).
